name: @repo/sim-engine-wasm
description: Wasm bundle of the Rust NBA simulator (packages/sim-engine-rs). Regenerate with `pnpm regenerate`.

scripts.regenerate: cd ../sim-engine-rs && wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir ../sim-engine-wasm --no-default-features && cd ../sim-engine-wasm && cp package.template.json package.json && rm -f .gitignore && mkdir -p ../../apps/web/public/wasm && cp sim_engine_rs_bg.wasm ../../apps/web/public/wasm/sim_engine.wasm
